fields.label: In Page Nav
fields.message: In-page navigation is auto-generated based on the title of each content block in the body.

fields.label: Background Image
fields.name: p2_background_image
fields.instructions: If no image is added a default image will be provided automatically.

fields.label: Best Lawyer Award
fields.name: p2_best_lawyer_award
fields.instructions: Reserved for attorney specific Best Lawyer award. If no image is chosen a fallback will automatically be selected.

fields.label: Best Lawyer Link
fields.name: p2_best_lawyer_link
fields.instructions: Link will be applied to Best Lawyer Award icon. The link should go to the attorney's bestlawyers.com page.

fields.label: All Awards Image
fields.name: p2_all_awards
fields.instructions: If no image is chosen a fallback will automatically be selected.

fields.label: Related Links
fields.message: Related links can be updated using the native WordPress Menus in Appearance > Menus

fields.label: Main Body
fields.name: p3_main_body
fields.instructions:
This section provides 4 main elements: Section Title, Copy Block, CTA Block, and Video Embed.
  • The Section TItle is an H2 element that will generate an in-page nav link, use this to start a section.
  • The Copy Block is a WYSIWYG editor that can be used to add copy for a section.
  • The CTA Block adds in a form with CTA Text, pre-populated.
  • The Video Embed Block allows you to add YouTube videos in-page with just the link.

sub_fields.label: CTA Text
sub_fields.name: cta_text
sub_fields.default_value:
If you have been charged with a crime, contact us TODAY for a FREE consultation.

Call or Text us 24/7 at

(614) 500-3836

Or fill out our online form to start your case today.

sub_fields.label: Youtube Embed URL
sub_fields.name: youtube_embed_url
sub_fields.instructions: Use the embed link that YouTube provides from the share button

sub_fields.label: CTA
sub_fields.message: CTA Fields are pulled from the Hero tab.

sub_fields.label: CTA
sub_fields.message: CTA Fields are pulled from the Hero tab.
